_note: Wtorek June 30 — MEGA EVENT: RKLB przejmuje Iridium (IRDM) za $8B ($54/akcje = $27 cash + RKLB stock) ogłoszone June 29; RKLB zamknęło June 29 na $97.95 (+15.86%) a June 30 handluje ~$99.35; Craig-Hallum podniósł cel do $120. AVEX: nowe kontrakty USAF $18.5M (OWA drony) + $15.2M (FIRIS) = $33.7M nowych kontraktów; Russell 2000 effective June 29; premarket June 30 $20.03 (+11.65%). CRWD split 4:1 JUTRO (July 2) — cena dziś ~$742 (implied post-split $185.50). LIME IPO cenowanie DZIŚ po sesji, listing JUTRO July 1 ($24-26, $886.7M rev 2025, FCF+). QBTS $23.62 (był $21.88, +8%). Nasdaq +2.07% June 29 — semiconductory: ALAB+16%, KLA+12%, AMAT+11%; Alphabet dołączyła do Dow +5%. Trump EO June 29: 'Lowering Cost of Living by Promoting Freedom to Fix' (right to repair). Market risk-on.
